---
title: "Contact us"
pagetitle: "Contact"
subtitle: "We'd love to hear from you!"
---

::: {.page-shell}

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-body}
### Email

::: {.contact-copy}
Reach out directly at [info@realgoodresearch.com](mailto:info@realgoodresearch.com) to discuss a project, course, collaboration, or idea.
:::
:::



::: {.contact-body}
### Collaborative Coding

::: {.contact-copy}
Find our code and collaborate with us on GitHub at <a href="https://github.com/realgoodresearch" target="_blank">github.com/realgoodresearch</a>.
:::
:::

:::
